title: Wooden Ice Cream Set for Kids, More Pcs Wooden Role Play Ice Cream Shop Play Food Kitchen Toy Imaginative Toys Gift for 3 4 5 6 7 Year Old Girls & Boys, Christmas
features: [Ice Cream Fun] - This ice cream toy set includes 1 ice cream counter, 4 popsicles, 2 waffle cones, 10 different flavored ice cream scoops, 2 ice cream cups, 2 wooden scoops, 1 ice cream scooper, 10 toy banknotes and a menu.This engaging pretend play experience offers kids a fun social alternative to screens

[Safe Wooden Construction] - This wooden ice cream set is durable, safe, and easy to clean. With smooth edges and eco-friendly solid wood, it’s designed for children’s safety and perfect for imaginative play. Safe and reassuring kids' kitchen playset

[Creative Role Play] - This ice cream set offers kids a chance to engage in imaginative role-play as they run their own ice cream shop. Through taking orders, creating ice cream combinations, and handling money, This set improve them math like counting and currency recognition

[Endless Ice Cream Creations] - The Vibrant Variety ice cream toy lets kids mix and match colorful ice cream cones and popsicles, encouraging creativity and fun. With easy-to-assemble parts and different flavors, kids can enjoy endless combinations while learning about colors and counting

[Ideal Gifts] - The easy-to-assemble and disassemble design keeps kids engaged for hours. Whether at home, in a kindergarten, or early learning center, this ice cream toy brings joy and educational value, making it an ideal gift for kid, especially for kid's birthdays, Christmas or any special occasion
